# CLAUDE.md

Guidelines for AI agents working on Razor2-Client-Agent.

## Build & test

```bash
perl Makefile.PL
make
make test          # or: prove -l t/
```

The XS extension (`deHTMLxs`) requires a C compiler.

## Generated files — do not edit

- **MANIFEST** — Generated by `make manifest`. Do not manually edit or re-sort.
- **README.md** — Generated from POD: `pod2markdown lib/Razor2/Client/Agent.pm > README.md`. Do not edit directly.
- **Makefile** — Generated by `perl Makefile.PL`.
- **MYMETA.json / MYMETA.yml** — Generated by `perl Makefile.PL`.

## Release policy

Releases are made by the human maintainer. Fixes must never:
- Update the `Changes` file
- Bump version numbers (in `Makefile.PL`, `Version.pm`, or anywhere else)

Version and changelog updates are part of the release process, not individual PRs.

## Code style

- Format with `perltidy` using the project's `.perltidyrc`
- Use `strict` and `warnings` in all modules
- Perl code targets `MIN_PERL_VERSION` 5.010

## Project structure

- `lib/Razor2/` — Perl modules (Client, Engine, Preproc, Signature, etc.)
- `bin/` — CLI tools (razor-check, razor-report, razor-admin, razor-revoke, razor-client)
- `t/` — Test suite
- `docs/` — POD man page sources
- `deHTMLxs.xs` / `_deHTMLxs.c` — XS/C extension for HTML stripping
